hero.title: Build beautiful websites with AI
hero.subtitle: EU sovereign. Open source. Powered by Mistral.

demo.title: From prompt to production in seconds
demo.description: Watch the multi-agent pipeline plan, design, and build — with full cost transparency at every step.
demo.prompt: A SaaS landing page for a project management tool with pricing, features, and testimonials

rate_limit.title: Rate limit reached
rate_limit.description: You've hit the generation limit for today. Try again tomorrow or self-host for unlimited access.

timeout.title: Generation timed out
timeout.description: The pipeline took too long. Try a simpler prompt or switch to Budget profile.

budget.title: Budget exceeded
budget.description: This generation would exceed the per-request budget. Try a simpler prompt.

api_error.title: API error
api_error.description: The Mistral API returned an error. This is usually temporary.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.description: An unexpected error occurred during generation.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for local, hosted, and team workflows.
pricing.description: Choose the setup that matches how you want to generate, inspect, and ship websites with ArkhosAI.

starter.label: Starter
starter.description: Run ArkhosAI locally and keep full control over your stack.

pro.label: Pro
pro.description: Managed infrastructure with the same transparent generation workflow.

team.label: Team
team.description: For agencies and internal platforms that need governance and deeper integration.

pricing.ctaTitle: Start with the workflow that fits today.
pricing.ctaBody: You can begin locally, then move to a managed setup when your team needs more structure.

gallery.title: A few directions ArkhosAI can already generate.
gallery.description: From product marketing pages to hospitality sites, the system adapts the design language while keeping the build pipeline visible.

saas.title: Product launch landing page
saas.description: Sharp hierarchy, strong CTA flow, pricing blocks, and trust-building detail for a software launch.

restaurant.title: Warm hospitality site
restaurant.description: Editorial photography layouts, reservation-first structure, and a more tactile visual rhythm.

portfolio.title: Personal studio showcase
portfolio.description: A restrained, type-led layout built to highlight case studies, craft, and a distinct point of view.

gallery.ctaBody: Ready to generate your own version instead of browsing examples?

docs.title: How ArkhosAI works, from prompt to production output.
docs.description: The generator is built around a transparent pipeline, typed frontend surfaces, and a backend designed for streaming and reviewability.

start.title: Start with a prompt
start.body: Describe the site you want, choose a quality profile, and launch the generation pipeline with locale-aware routing.

pipeline.title: Review the live pipeline
pipeline.body: Watch each agent step stream in, inspect plan output, and follow cumulative cost and file generation in real time.

deployment.title: Ship or iterate
deployment.body: Download the result, keep iterating through the workspace, or connect the generated output to a larger product flow.

about.title: ArkhosAI is building an EU-native answer to opaque website generation tools.
about.description: The goal is not just to generate pages quickly, but to make the underlying process understandable, sovereign, and extensible.

sovereign.title: European by default
sovereign.body: Infrastructure, model choices, and positioning are shaped around EU hosting and privacy expectations.

transparent.title: Transparent generation
transparent.body: The pipeline exposes planning, streaming, file output, and cost instead of hiding the whole process behind a spinner.

open.title: Open-core pragmatism
open.body: Self-hosting and hosted product development can coexist when the architecture stays simple and composable.

blog.title: Notes on AI website generation, product design, and agent pipelines.
blog.description: A place for implementation details, product decisions, and the tradeoffs behind building ArkhosAI in public.

shipping.title: Shipping the first real workspace
shipping.excerpt: What changed when the generator moved from a simple input form to a stateful streaming workspace.

routing.title: Why smart routing matters
routing.excerpt: Different agents need different tradeoffs. Routing is what keeps quality, speed, and cost in balance.

design.title: Avoiding generic AI UI
design.excerpt: Why ArkhosAI leans into a sharper editorial look instead of defaulting to interchangeable SaaS gradients.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: This page outlines how ArkhosAI handles product, generation, and operational data.
privacy.section1Body: We collect the information needed to operate the product, secure the platform, and understand generation usage patterns.
privacy.section2Body: Usage data helps improve reliability, rate limiting, debugging, and the overall generation experience.
privacy.section3Body: Hosted and self-hosted deployments can apply different retention and access policies depending on the environment.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: These terms describe the general rules for using ArkhosAI and its hosted or self-hosted variants.
terms.section1Body: Use the product lawfully, respect infrastructure limits, and avoid abusive generation or scraping behavior.
terms.section2Body: Feature availability may differ between local, hosted, and future enterprise versions of ArkhosAI.
terms.section3Body: As the product evolves, these terms may be updated to reflect new capabilities, pricing, or deployment models.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: Cookies and local storage are used sparingly for product preferences and session-level behavior.
cookies.section1Body: Theme, locale, and similar UI settings may be persisted locally to keep the interface consistent between visits.
cookies.section2Body: Hosted environments may use essential cookies required for authentication, session continuity, and platform security.
cookies.section3Body: You can manage browser storage directly, and self-hosted deployments can define their own cookie posture.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.description: Company and publishing information for ArkhosAI and its operator.
imprint.section1Body: ArkhosAI is developed under Bleucommerce SAS, based in Orléans, France.
imprint.section2Body: The product focuses on AI-assisted website generation with an EU-first infrastructure and product strategy.
imprint.section3Body: For legal or business inquiries, use the official project and company channels associated with ArkhosAI.
